summary: Same root cause as d0d59599: server resolves worker project=worktree (worktrees/backend-2) to an empty worktree-local todos.db; the real todo lives in main repo .collab/todos.db (direct sqlite3 read returns it). get_todo returns 'todo not found' from the worktree, so complete_todo cannot record on the tracking project. Ironically this todo's own goal is to verify bookkeeping stays on the tracking project — that mechanism is currently broken.
